vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently in a state of total biological failure. There is no evidence of living plant tissue in any of the registered pots. The environment is effectively a sterile soil-based setup.
vision_report.anomalies: The primary anomaly is the complete absence of the registered flora. The presence of the white rabbit in P3 is the only consistent anchor.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a complete absence of the expected botanical specimens. Across the five-day observation window, the pots have remained consistently devoid of plant life. The soil appears uniform and undisturbed, suggesting that the plants were either removed, failed to germinate, or suffered total necrosis prior to the start of this sequence. The environment is stable but biologically inactive.
